TextENGNew: ``Goodbye, Chie-sensei~``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Goodbye. Be careful on your way home.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: With classes over, the younger students dashed energetically across the schoolyard. Watching them go, Chie-sensei crouched down by the rain gutter's outlet.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Wow, this is worse than I expected...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: She peered inside, grimacing, and let out a sigh tinged with exasperation. In her hands, she held a scrub brush with a handle and a tube-cleaning brush like the kind used for test tubes.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Oh, Sensei, are you cleaning the rain gutter?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Yes. This morning's weather forecast said heavy rain is coming soon, so I thought I'd clean it out while I could.@k@vS20/22/441400017. ...But it seems it's been neglected for quite a while. It's a disaster in there.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Let me see.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Yikes, that's bad. If there's a downpour, this will overflow in no time.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Being in the mountains, debris accumulates on the roof easily. Maybe we should call in a professional.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Oh, this much we can handle ourselves. I'll round up some people and we'll get up on the roof--``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``That won't do. Even though it's not a tall building, a fall could cause serious injury.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Ahaha, I wouldn't ask anyone clumsy enough to fall!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Mion laughed brightly. ...Well, she had been at this school longer than almost anyone, so she probably knew the routine.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``If you're going to call a professional, what we really need is more downspouts. If this one outlet gets clogged, every gutter on the building becomes useless.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``You're right...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Plus, even though the gutters run all around the building, one single drain pipe is just not enough. During that last cloudburst, the water couldn't drain fast enough and the area by the windows was flooded.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...You make a good point. Having the entire building's rainwater funnel through this one pipe is a structural flaw. All right, I'll bring it up with the principal.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``But they'll probably say there's no budget for it. ...Oh, how about we get the town council to donate one? They'd do it right away, I bet.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Hehehe. I've never heard of anyone donating a rain gutter. I appreciate the thought, but the school should solve its own problems.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Ahaha, you're really a stickler for the rules, Sensei! ...So, when should we clean the gutters?@k@vS20/03/440300152. Tomorrow, or the day after?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Let's see. We'll discuss it in homeroom tomorrow.@k@vS20/22/441400024. I'm counting on you, Class President.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Roger that~♪``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
